name: You're the One Who Should Disappear.

issues.description: Extraneous second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and condition 'Always'. Card only has one Counter effect; this second effect does not match the card text at all.
TrashFromHand should be optional (preceded by 'You may'). Current structure treats trash as mandatory. Should use conditional optional syntax or clarify intent.

Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct for 'during this battle', but the conditional power boost (only if trash succeeds) must be properly nested. Current nesting appears correct but second effect undermines validity.
